Bus Timings

DPR1 Bus Timetable Ibn Battuta to Dubai Parks

May 24, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey Dubai explorers! Ever heard of Ibn Battuta Mall and Dubai Parks and Resorts? They’re two must-see spots in the city. And Dubai Parks and Resorts? It’s non-stop fun for all ages. Think rides, shows, and splashes galore.

The best part? Getting between these two is a piece of cake. There’s a bus that’ll zip you from Ibn Battuta right to the parks. Curious about the bus schedule? I’ve got all the details ready for you. Let’s make your Dubai adventure hassle-free!

Contents

DPR1 Bus Timings

Designed with passenger convenience in mind, the DPR1 bus operates with precision and punctuality throughout the day. Commuters can rely on the well-planned schedules, featuring regular departures and arrivals, ensuring a seamless travel experience for all. And here is the dpr1 bus timings, we give you the timetable.

Embarking on the DPR1 bus journey guarantees a comfortable and enjoyable ride for passengers of all ages. The fleet of modern buses boasts amenities such as spacious seating, climate control, and accessibility features, ensuring a pleasant travel experience for all commuters. Furthermore, the courteous and professional demeanor of the drivers adds to the overall positive ambiance, making each journey a memorable one. And the ticket is very affordable, it costs around only for 6 AED.

From Ibn Battuta From Dubai Parks
07:30 08:10
08:45 09:25
10:00 10:40
11:15 11:55
12:30 13:10
13:45 14:25
15:00 15:40
16:15 16:55
17:30 18:10
18:45 19:25
20:00 20:40
21:15 22:15
22:50 23:30

Download PDF Bus DPR1

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or use this link to view DPR1 Bus Timings.## How to Get to Dubai Parks & Resorts

Dubai, renowned for its progressive infrastructure and world-class attractions, introduces the DPR1 bus route as a testament to its commitment to accessible and efficient public transportation. It started in 2018 when the RTA announce to the public that there is a new bus route which served trip to DPR.

comhttps://cdn.emzeth.com/img/2024/04/DPR1-Bus-Route. jpg)

The DPR1 bus route commences its journey at Ibn Battuta, strategically positioned near the metro station for easy access. Here is the complete route and stops of dpr1 bus.1. Ibn Battuta

  1. Ibn Battuta, Food Court

  2. Jebel Ali Gardens,

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Staff Stop

  2. Dubai Parks & Resorts, VIP Parking P1

  3. Staff Stop

  4. The Outlet Village

  5. Dubai Parks & Resorts

Other bus routes in Dubai that you can explore include the E102 bus route, which runs from Ibn Battuta to Mussafah, and the 320 bus route, which travels from Al Rashidiya to Academic City.Read Also: Bus Route from Al Qusais to Gold Souk ## The Distance

Spanning a distancearound 23 kilometers, it only takes25 minutes from Ibn Battuta to Dubai Parks and Resorts. And of course the DPR1 bus route offers a convenient way to traverse the vibrant landscape of Dubai.

By opting for public transport, passengers can bypass traffic congestion and parking challenges, saving both time and stress.## Journey Experience

The DPR1 bus from Ibn Battuta to Dubai Parks offers a long but enjoyable ride, passing through key areas of Jebel Ali.

As the bus continues, passengers catch glimpses of the sprawling Dubai South district, which is rapidly growing as a hub for aviation and logistics.

By providing a seamless connection between Ibn Battuta and Dubai Parks & Resorts, the DPR1 bus offers a convenient, affordable, and sustainable transportation solution for residents and visitors alike. And of course knowing dpr1 bus timings is very important to know.

Whether embarking on a thrilling adventure at the theme parks or commuting to work, the DPR1 bus promises a hassle-free journey through the heart of Dubai’s dynamic landscape.

With its comprehensive route, reliable timings, and comfortable travel experience, the DPR1 bus stands as a testament to Dubai’s commitment to excellence in public transportation.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 24, 2025.
